component.project_license: BSD-3-Clause AND LGPL-2.1-or-later AND Apache-2.0 AND IJG AND MIT AND GPL-2.0-or-later AND ISC AND OpenSSL AND (MPL-1.1 OR GPL-2.0-only OR LGPL-2.0-only)
component.name: Trivalent

description.p: Trivalent is a web browser built on the Chromium open source project with the goal of improving security and usability.
